=== VALID ===
123-45-6789
001-01-0001
899-99-9999
456-78-9012
234-56-7890

=== INVALID ===
666-01-0001
900-01-0001
999-01-0001
000-01-0001
123-00-6789
123-45-0000

=== FALSE POSITIVES ===
4111-1111-1111-1111
123-456-7890
12-34-5678
192-168-1-1

=== FORMATTING ===
123-45-6789
123 45 6789

=== EDGE CASES ===
001-01-0001
899-99-9999
100-01-0001

=== KNOWN LIMITATIONS ===
123456789
